scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:css && npm run build:html && npm run build:static
scripts.build:static: cp src/rss.xml dist/rss.xml && cp -r src/public dist/public
scripts.deploy: npm run build && vercel build && vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && vercel build && vercel deploy --prebuilt
